title: Event Mill Plugin Manifest
description: Defines the metadata contract for every Event Mill plugin. The manifest drives routing, discovery, LLM context construction, and CI validation. Schema version tracks independently from plugin versions.

tool_name.description: Stable unique tool identifier. Lowercase, digits, underscores only. MUST be unique across the loaded registry. SHOULD begin with a short domain prefix (pcap_, azure_, gcp_, risk_, ti_).

pillar.description: Investigation pillar this plugin belongs to. MUST match the directory the plugin is stored under.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in CLI help screens and tool listings.

description_short.description: One-line summary for CLI listings and compact UI.

description_long.description: Detailed description optimized for LLM tool selection. Describes WHEN the tool should be used, what it does, and what it returns. This text is injected into the LLM prompt by the router.

entry_point.description: Relative path to the Python module containing the tool class.

artifacts_consumed.description: Artifact types this tool accepts as INPUT. Use 'none' only for tools that generate output from user interaction (e.g., threat model builder).

artifacts_produced.description: Artifact types this tool PRODUCES as output. Used by the router to determine chaining potential (output of tool A feeds input of tool B).

capabilities.description: Capability tokens for routing. Format: namespace:value. Namespaces: artifact, operation, entity, domain, output.

input_schema.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema file defining valid input payloads.

output_schema.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema file defining valid output payloads.

timeout_class.description: Execution time expectation. fast=30s, medium=120s, slow=600s.

cost_hint.description: Resource cost indication. Affects scheduling and auto-invoke decisions.

safe_for_auto_invoke.description: True if the tool is read-only, low-risk, and suitable for LLM-directed invocation without explicit analyst confirmation.

requires_auth.description: True if the tool needs credentials beyond local file access.

requires_llm.description: True if the tool depends on LLM capabilities (e.g., image analysis, threat model building). If the MCP connection is unavailable, tools with requires_llm=true MUST return a structured error.

external_connectivity.description: True if the tool makes network calls beyond the MCP connection.

minimum_framework_version.description: Minimum Event Mill framework version required.

dependencies.description: Python package dependencies beyond the framework baseline.

reference_data_overrides.description: List of framework reference data keys this plugin overrides or extends when active. Documented in the plugin README.

stability.description: Maturity level. experimental=local testing; verified=contract tests pass, reviewed; core=maintained by project team; deprecated=phase-out.

tags.description: Freeform tags for discovery and search.

result_summary_fields.description: Output fields to include in CLI summary tables. Drives the default summarize_for_llm() behavior if the plugin does not override it.

chains_to.description: Tool names whose input this tool's output can feed. Advisory for the router, not enforced at runtime.

chains_from.description: Tool names whose output this tool can accept as input. Advisory for the router, not enforced at runtime.
